name: Apricot-Pork Meatball
recipeInstructions:
FOR APRICOT-PORK MEATBALLS: Preheat oven to 350°F. Mix all ingredients except Spicy Apricot Glaze in a bowl. Shape mixture into 20 meatballs and place them in an ungreased rectangular pan, 13x9x2 inches. Bake uncovered for about 20 minutes or until no longer pink in the center; drain well. (If using Do-Ahead Tip, stop here).
Prepare Spicy Apricot Glaze by mixing all ingredients in a saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until hot.
DO AHEAD TIP: Place drained cooked meatballs on a greased cookie sheet and freeze uncovered for about 1 hour or until firm. Transfer the frozen meatballs to a labeled airtight freezer container. Store no longer than two months.
Approximately 30 minutes before serving, preheat oven to 400°F. Arrange the meatballs in a single layer in an ungreased rectangular pan, 13x9x2 inches. Bake uncovered for 15-20 minutes or until hot. Prepare Spicy Apricot Glaze and serve with meatballs.
Diet Exchange: 1/2 lean meat, 1/2 fruit
